summary: Smart Money Vault project (frontend) with roadmap batches; currently addressing ConnectBotWizardModal Ed25519 key generation bug and adding tweetnacl dependency.
architectural_notes: Use tweetnacl (nacl.sign.keyPair()) for Ed25519 key generation so public key is derived from private key; store private key as 64-byte secretKey (seed+pubkey) hex and pass 32-byte publicKey to registerBotPublicKey().
known_issues: ConnectBotWizardModal Ed25519 keygen is broken: handleGenerateKeypair currently produces two random blobs instead of a valid derived keypair.

existing_features.title: Add the `tweetnacl` npm package as a dependency in the frontend project (update the frontend package manifest and lockfile as applicable) so frontend TypeScript code can import it (e.g., `import nacl from "tweetnacl"`).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add tweetnacl dependency to frontend and update ConnectBotWizardModal Ed25519 keygen to use nacl.sign.keyPair() with correct secretKey/publicKey handling.
